name: alfred-voice
title: Alfred — Voice & Text
description: Local speech-to-text + LLM cleanup. Dictate, transform selected text, and browse history via the Alfred engine — talks to the warm daemon, no API key.
author: benrben

commands.name: dictate
commands.title: Dictate (Toggle)
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Start recording; run again to stop and process. Bind a hotkey for push-to-talk style capture.

commands.name: transform-text
commands.title: Transform Text
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Clean up / reshape the selected text or clipboard through the Alfred pipeline.

commands.name: type-and-process
commands.title: Type & Process
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Type a line and run it through the Alfred pipeline.

commands.name: history
commands.title: History
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Browse recent Alfred results; copy or paste any of them.

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Alfred Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Menu-bar control: recording state plus quick access to dictate, transform, and history.

commands.name: engine-status
commands.title: Engine Status
commands.subtitle: Alfred
commands.description: Check the warm daemon, resolved engine paths, and run the engine's doctor.

preferences.name: daemonPort
preferences.title: Daemon Port
preferences.description: Port of the warm engine (voicebridge.py serve). Must match the front-end.

preferences.name: backend
preferences.title: LLM Backend
preferences.description: Override the config's backend for every capture.

preferences.name: defaultMode
preferences.title: Default Format
preferences.description: Default rewrite mode (email|message|commit|prompt|notes|raw or a custom one). Leave empty to use your config.

preferences.name: pythonBin
preferences.title: Python (venv)
preferences.description: Path to the engine's venv python — only used to start the daemon or fall back when it's down.

preferences.name: soxBin
preferences.title: sox Path
preferences.description: Path to the sox recorder (used by Dictate).
